body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-7304", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "SGLang's multimodal generation runtime is vulnerable to unauthenticated remote code execution when the --enable-custom-logit-processor option is enabled, as Python objects loaded via dill.loads() will be deserialized without validation.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00585, "percentile": 0.43535}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-36m8-w8qf-g76p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-29T17:29:23Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-36m8-w8qf-g76p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-36m8-w8qf-g76p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-7304"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-18T12:16:16Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T12:31:47Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7304", "https://antiproof.ai/blog/three-rces-in-sglang", "https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/tree/main/python/sglang", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-36m8-w8qf-g76p"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang", "summary": "SGLang: Unauthenticated RCE via --enable-custom-logit-processor", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-29T17:29:24Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-36m8-w8qf-g76p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "sglang"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.4.1.post7, <= 0.5.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
